_doc: Bug-bounty hunting operation — live targets + access reality. Researched June 2026. Honest: most attempts pay $0, contest code is usually gated behind a platform account (operator's), and crowded contests (high submission counts) = duplicate risk. Ranked by ACCESSIBILITY (public code we can actually audit) × prize × odds (newer/smaller = better odds, less audited). The agent does the audit work (read code, hunt vuln classes, write PoC + report); the operator holds the platform account + submits.

targets.name: 0xMarkets
targets.note: Fresh code + real payout but very crowded now. Needs operator's HackenProof account to see scope + submit.

targets.name: DART SC DualDefense
targets.note: Small prize → fewer hunters → better odds, but ends in ~2 days. Tight.

targets.name: Circuit
targets.note: Ongoing bounty — deployed/verified contracts may be publicly auditable without an account.

targets.name: Lendvest
targets.note: Lending protocol — lending = rich vuln surface (oracle, liquidation, interest math).

targets.name: Citrea Protocol
targets.note: Bitcoin L2, big bounty. Public repo likely but large + heavily reviewed = low odds, high payout.

targets.name: NEAR Intents: Bridges
targets.note: Bridges = highest-value bug class (cross-chain). Public NEAR repos. Hard but huge.

targets.name: Uniswap
targets.note: Public code, $15.5M, but reviewed by thousands. Audit it to LEARN, not to expect a payout.

method_note: Audit methodology lives in docs/BUG-HUNT-METHODOLOGY.md — the systematic vuln-class checklist the agent runs against any in-scope contract. Findings log: data/bug-findings.jsonl.
honest: Realistic plan: (1) operator creates a HackenProof + Cantina account (free) so we can access gated contest scopes + submit. (2) We focus on NEWER/SMALLER, less-crowded targets + ongoing bounties with PUBLIC deployed code (better odds than 426-submission contests). (3) The agent audits real code systematically; expect many passes with nothing before a finding — that's the job. (4) Lending + bridge protocols have the richest bug surface.
